ab: nusauny uli ku kacuing mun a sema vavuwa.
ch: A:我今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: aya ti kina liaw cacalag i vavuwa.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: nusauny uli ku kacuing mun a sema can.
ch: A:我今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: uli vaik itjen a kemangkang.
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: nusauny uli vaik itjen a mainu?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: uli kacuing tjen sema pana ni sinsi.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: nusauny uli vaik itjen mainu?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: uli kacuing tjen ni sinsi a sema vavuwa.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: nusauny uli vaik tjen a sema pana?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: ini, uli kacuing tjen a sema vavuwa ni sinsi.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: nusauny uli vaik itjen a sema vavuwa?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: ini, nusauny uli vaik itjen sema can.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: sinsi, ama uli tja pacunan i pana?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: vaik itjen a pacun ta tungbu.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi, uli vaik itjen ma vavuwa pacun ta anema?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: ali vaiki pacun ta kadradrungulj.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: anema tja kudaing a ma can?
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: uli vaik amen ma can paljilji tua nia talem a puday, kinemenemu izua sasiq, pangac yu!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: sinsi uli vaik itjen a sema pana kemavekav?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: ini, uli vaik itjen pacun ta tungbu.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: sinsi uli vaik itjen sema can temalem ta ljaceng?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: uli vaik itjen a kemangkang.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: izua za tungbu a minlayalayap.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: kasauny sipuita pacun ta valjualjut a tungbu.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: izua za kadradrungulj a minlayalayap.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: yi! wa! tjengelay a ken ta kadradrungulj, sasanguwaq.
ch: B:耶!哇!我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: izua za kadradrungulj a minlayalayap.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: ika kadradrungulj azua, pangac azua.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: pacucunu imaza, maya vaik a ljacadja ta kadjunangan yu!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: ui, ika men na vaik a pasa ljacadja ta kadjunangan.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: maya mekelj, kigalju a djemavac tjakuyanga sekulilj.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: sa djaljaw ken a pacun.
en: I want to see them right away.
